name: Italmobiliare S.p.A.
summary: Italmobiliare S.p.A., an investment holding company, owns and manages a portfolio of equity and other investments in the financial and industrial sectors in Italy and internationally. The company develops and produces fresh food packaging products, such as rigid containers, PET, and polypropylene for various food applications; and provides various trading products comprising films, containers, machineries, and accessories for fresh food industry and retail applications. It also produces and distributes electricity through renewable sources. The company has 15 hydropower plants; and approximately 300 kilometers of transmission lines in Italy, as well as 2 wind farms with a total capacity of 18 MW in Bulgaria. It also manufactures and sells coffee capsules and pods through specialist shops, as well as online and mass merchandising channels. In addition, the company manages private equity funds; and manufactures and sells outdoor footwear and ski equipment under the Tecnica, Blizzard, Lowa, Moon Boot, Rollerblade, and Nordica brand names. Further, it designs, manufactures, and distributes locks; cylinders; padlocks; and related security and safety equipment, such as emergency exits devices and door closers. Additionally, the company engages in the distribution and sale of LPG; and real estate business. Italmobiliare S.p.A. was founded in 1946 and is headquartered in Milan, Italy.
